calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jonathan Lee appeared via zoom for Gordon Heikit Yung and Helena Sau Yu Yung (petitioners).

The Court waives the remote appearance instructions requirement.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 2, 2024 is admitted to probate. Gordon Heikit Yung and Helena Sau Yu Yung are appointed as the Executors of the estate with full authority.Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 5, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Continued To Jun-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan Lee for Gordon Heikit Yung and Helena Sau Yu Yung, Petitioners (via Zoom).

The Court noted that there were multiple procedural issues that remained unresolved. Mr. Lee confirmed that efforts were underway to address those issues and anticipated resolution within the next week. The Court inquired whether any additional information was available regarding the timing of execution of the will. Mr. Lee responded that no further information was currently available.

The Court continued the matter to June 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for counsel to resolve procedural issues.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
